mapper.sql: t.task_id AS "id",t.project_id AS "projectId",t.work_order_id AS "workOrderId",t.task_type AS "taskType",t.task_kind AS "taskKind",t.stage_code AS "stageCode",t.priority,t.status,t.next_run_at AS "nextRunAt",t.claimed_by AS "claimedBy",t.attempt_count AS "attemptCount",t.max_attempts AS "maxAttempts",t.version,t.created_at AS "createdAt",t.updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT ,t.workflow_instance_id AS "workflowInstanceId",t.stage_instance_id AS "stageInstanceId",t.workflow_node_instance_id AS "workflowNodeInstanceId",t.workflow_node_id AS "workflowNodeId",t.workflow_definition_version_id AS "workflowDefinitionVersionId",t.workflow_definition_digest AS "workflowDefinitionDigest",t.configuration_bundle_id AS "configurationBundleId",t.configuration_bundle_digest AS "configurationBundleDigest",t.form_ref AS "formRef",t.claimed_at AS "claimedAt",t.started_at AS "startedAt",t.completed_at AS "completedAt",t.result_ref AS "resultRef",t.result_digest AS "resultDigest",COALESCE(t.input_version_refs,'[]'::jsonb)::text AS "inputVersionRefs",(SELECT a.principal_id FROM tsk_task_assignment a WHERE a.tenant_id=t.tenant_id AND a.task_id=t.task_id AND a.assignment_kind='RESPONSIBLE' AND a.status='ACTIVE' ORDER BY a.effective_from DESC LIMIT 1) AS "responsibleUserId",COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(a.principal_id ORDER BY a.principal_id) FROM tsk_task_assignment a WHERE a.tenant_id=t.tenant_id AND a.task_id=t.task_id AND a.assignment_kind='CANDIDATE' AND a.status='ACTIVE'),'[]'::jsonb)::text AS "candidateUserIds" FROM tsk_task t WHERE t.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND t.task_id=#{taskId}
